queries.question: What acts are performed at each comedy show?
queries.sql: SELECT Acts.act_name  from Comedy_Shows_Acts join Comedy_Shows on Comedy_Shows_Acts.comedy_show_id = Comedy_Shows.comedy_show_id join Acts on Comedy_Shows_Acts.acts_comedy_shows_id = Acts.act_id   GROUP BY Comedy_Shows_Acts.acts_comedy_shows_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Comedy_Shows_Acts.comedy_show_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Comedy_Shows)

queries.question: What acts are performed at each comedy show?
queries.sql: select comedy_shows.show_title , acts.act_name from Comedy_Shows_Acts join Comedy_Shows on Comedy_Shows_Acts.comedy_show_id = Comedy_Shows.comedy_show_id join Acts on Comedy_Shows_Acts.acts_comedy_shows_id = Acts.act_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?show_title ?act_name WHERE {
  ?comedy_shows_acts a :Comedy_Shows_Acts .
  ?comedy_shows a :Comedy_Shows .
  ?comedy_shows_acts p:hasComedy_Shows ?comedy_shows .
  ?acts a :Acts .
  ?comedy_shows_acts p:hasActs ?acts .
  ?comedy_shows p:show_title ?show_title .
  ?acts p:act_name ?act_name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What acts are performed at each comedy show?
